title: CBP Edge
description: Schema for a typed, directional, conditional edge in the CBP graph. Edges connect two nodes and are gated by a conditional expression that determines activation based on current graph state.

id.description: BLAKE3-derived edge identifier, same derivation as nodes.

src.description: Source node id. The edge is directed from src to tgt.

rel.description: Edge type from the standard-8 vocabulary. Fixed set — the LLM never encounters novel relationship semantics.

strength.description: Relationship strength. Positive = reinforcing, negative = opposing (relevant for 'correlates'). Default 1.0 (full strength, positive).

conditional.description: Activation condition. Edges are conditional-first (invariant #3): unconditional edges use the literal 'always'.

w.description: Relevance weight of the edge itself.

ttl.description: Hard expiry in seconds. Null means no hard expiry.

prev.description: Prior version of this edge. Null on first version.

active.description: Whether this edge's conditional is currently satisfied. Computed at resolve-time, not stored. Present in resolved output only.

condition.description: Recursive conditional expression. Evaluates against current graph state to determine edge activation.

oneOf.description: Unconditional — edge is always active. Syntactic sugar per invariant #3.

leaf.description: A single comparison against a graph field value.

field.description: Accessor in the form <type>:<id>.<field>[.<subfield>...]. Example: prior:regime.val

op.description: Comparison operator. Strict typing — comparing incompatible types is an evaluation error, not false.

value.description: Comparison literal. Required for all ops except 'exists'. Type must match the resolved field type at evaluation time.

allCondition.description: Logical AND — all sub-conditions must be true for the edge to activate.

anyCondition.description: Logical OR — at least one sub-condition must be true for the edge to activate.

notCondition.description: Logical NOT — the sub-condition must be false for the edge to activate.
